title: [VIC] DeWALT 305mm Corded Compound Mitre Saw $629, Bonus $100 Gift Card, Redeem Stand & Cordless Sander Kit in-Store @ Bunnings
body:
Deal: [VIC] DeWALT 305mm Corded Compound Mitre Saw $629, Bonus $100 Gift Card, Redeem Stand & Cordless Sander Kit in-Store @ Bunnings

[RichardMelbourne] How'd you get that price? Showing $1,049 for me. I already have this mitre saw, but for the sake of other people.
[RichardMelbourne] Just realised that it wiped my actual location and replaced with Greenacre in NSW 🤦
[cycloneaussie] Pricing looks to be VIC specific, tried 3001, $1k in QLD.
[RichardMelbourne] I'm in Carrum Downs VIC 3201 - so must be specific locations in Vic, then.
Awesome mitre saw…
[mxlmxlmxl] Damn, not only this, table saw down to $599 plus sander/battery/charger and spend and save
Nailer 2 pack half price and two carry boxes and power stack batter by redemption too.
Massive Bunnigs x Dewalt sale.
$2500 goods for $1500 with about $500 of extras PLUS $300 gift card. Happy days
[HelloGood] The fantastic roads in Vic ruined the deal.
[slipperypete] damn, everthing I already have. what a saving
was hoping their plunge saw was on special but no
[mxlmxlmxl] Same - was after the track saw and router too. But happy with this buy. Almost bought the table for $809 the other day price matching Sydney Tools thinking it was a good buy
[1pq Lqmz] Many of their high end skins as well, 870/860/1007 all 239.
54V kits like the concrete saw, grinder, circ saw etc.
Batteries also discounted massively.
Apparently are left overs from the trade show and are considered write off.
[hippyhippy] This is a bargain.. I'm in Melbourne for the week luckily so just ordered lol.
[kiwizz] Ordered but can't see the 20 character reciept code on my online order (no tax invoice yet) - it expires tonight so might miss out on the gift card…
[dhx] You'll be fine as the "promotion period" is to 11:59PM tonight. Just wait to receive the invoice with the code on it, whenever that arrives.
T&Cs at https://media.bunnings.com.au/api/public/content/f655c008634…
[slipperypete] It’ll be that they’ll say you don’t qualify when you email the 20 code voucher…which you get when you pay for it so it will be the wrong date. You then go back with the original receipt to show the date and it'll be fine.
[slipperypete] when you apply for the redemption you need the 20 code tax invoice. you only get that when you get the item. when you submit this, they will say
Unfortunately, you are not eligible for a Bunnings e-gift card due to the below reason:
Date of purchase is outside the eligible period
This is because the 20 code invoice is from the date you picked it up.
What you have to do is go back (reply would have been better wording) and tell them the date you bought it and include the initial purchase with this. After that you will get a reply along the lines of
Thank you for reaching out regarding your Spend and Get Redemption. We apologise for the delayed response; our team are currently working through a significant increase in email queries at present.
We have investigated your receipt and can see that this was submitted using the tax invoice from outside of the redemption period causing the message below.
This has been resubmitted using the original payment receipt, and I can see this has been successfully submitted.
The confirmation email should come through shortly and the gift card (if all information is correct and the transaction is eligible) should come through within five business days.
[hippyhippy] @slipperypete: So just reply to them with the original order email?
[slipperypete] @hippyhippy: the gift card redemption wouldn't let me do that. you need the 20 character tax invoice code which is only on pickup.
I guess this stops peopole ordering, getting gift card and then canning the order?
[slipperypete] @hippyhippy: yes, second time around. I have had this a couple of times.
[adogl] Yep, but was able to order but not sure about the sander etc…worst case scenario I will return
[kiwizz] Also thinking the bonus items offer also expires today/tonight..
[adogl] Yes but the redemption is well into July
[dhx] If you buy online you only get the saw and $100 gift card (by application by end of July). The stand and sander+battery kit are only able to be claimed in store. Not sure what happens if you go in store and they don't have the stand, or don't have the sander, etc, and whether the entirety of the deal is actually claimable.
[Midday Murth] I asked last time I was in store.
If they don’t have the stock, they can’t honour the deal and will just send you to a store that does have the stock. Might differ depending on the person that you are talking to.
[kiwizz] Just went in (online order with pickup) and got the saw, table, sander, battery and battery charger. Managed to get the invoice number for the $100 gift card too. I called ahead to see if they could let me pick up today (great that they did!)
[dhx] @kiwizz: That's great to hear you got it all! Excellent bargain :)
Pricing this cheap indicates Bunnings might also be destocking DeWALT, given that they're in the process of destocking Bosch to replace with Einhell Pro (see [1]).
[1] https://www.ozbargain.com.au/node/963225#comment-17657893
[donkcat] Awesome price, resisting the urge to buy.
On the redemption ive been through this in the past. Order date will say today but invoice date will be the day you pick it up. Bunnings go by order date, and Dewalt also provided my redemption by order date.
[uncyspam] Seriously considered driving down to Wodonga to pick one up. The deal doesn't apply to them, or Mildura, or Yarrawonga. It seems they are too close to the border.
—edit—
Just tested a few other regional vic locations. None are included. This is Melbourne and Geelong only from what I can see.
[renw] Very nice deals with dewalt:
https://www.bunnings.com.au/dewalt-54v-9-0ah-230mm-xr-flexvo…
This kit is around $1200 normally, now $779 with two extra flexvolt batteries
[mxlmxlmxl] Honestly, its buy 4 batteries get a concrete saw for free at this price. Great buy.
[Averell] It's showing $1299 for me. Is it expired?
[johnno07] This thing is a beast. It's also super accurate. Cannot recommend more highly at this price.
[Man10United] It's so tempting to the point that I want to buy another one.
[jleang] Oh man i missed it. Even though i have no idea what i was going to use it for, i feel empty inside cuz i missed it
[slipperypete] if you select a store that has the offer you can still order it. You won't get the bonus sander but will get the other items which is still a huge bargain
[onetwothreefour] Kind of related question to this product - does anyone know what type of lube is good to get a mitre saw to slide smoothly again? Mines getting a bit rusty and it sticks a lot.
[maxwellian] If you're talking about the slides and stuff, this stuff is amazing: https://3inone.com.au/product/multi-purpose-drip-oil/
I use it on everything that moves, pliers, saws, door hinges, etc
[skjaus2015] just bought one from Bunnings bayswater. Got the sander, battery and charger for 3 cents but no stand. The guy said the stand is within the box.( I have to collect the saw tomorrow). What about others ? did they get a bonus stand ?
[mxlmxlmxl] Nah, he's wrong. The stand is like 1.5m long and massive. Def separate box when I picked up mine.
[1pq Lqmz] The stand is a separate item. It apparently is no longer in their inventory system so they won't be able to check stock. So they basically assumed there's no stock (bonus says while stock lasts). However, the stand DWS723 does exist in the store. You need to go to the power tool shop and find it. Happened to me as well, lucky I didn't take their word for it and insisted on checking.
These are apparently left overs from the trade expo last week. It's like a write offnl to their store so that's why they came up so cheap
[PopCounty] This has to be deal of the FY end. The whole lot bundle.. Just amazing deal.
[LittleTicket] Potentially stupid question…what’s stopping someone from buying this, getting the instant redemptions and then returning it?
[AngryAlfred] Damn, absolutely hate that I had to buy the Ryobi one like 4 months ago because the big brands were all 2-3x the price… At least a 254mm blade you can swap out the blades with the table saw though. This is a heck of a deal and a serious bit of kit
